prompt: A haunting cinematic double exposure portrait using my face as the subject. The face emerges from a violent storm, with one side remaining sharply detailed while the other dissolves into swirling dark mist, smoke, and hundreds of black birds scattering into the sky. Windswept hair twists dramatically upward like living shadows, blending seamlessly into storm clouds and atmospheric fog. In the background, a desolate coastline stretches toward the horizon with distant power lines fading into the mist, creating a sense of isolation and melancholy. My intense gaze remains the focal point, conveying resilience, mystery, and emotional depth amid chaos. Moody gray blue color grading, ethereal fog, cinematic lighting, hyper realistic skin texture, dramatic contrast, ultra detailed facial features, emotional storytelling, dark fantasy atmosphere, volumetric lighting, masterpiece composition, award winning photography, photorealistic, 16K, ultra sharp focus, surreal yet believable, fine art portrait, cinematic depth of field.
